rules.enforced: before fork-point checkpoint capture or clone creation
rules.reason: limits concurrent agent fan-out so reviews and cleanup stay bounded

rules.enforced: before fork, restore, undo, or promote proceeds
rules.reason: keeps risky operations anchored to a recent recoverable checkpoint

rules.enforced: after touched paths are known and before workspace writes or branch creation
rules.reason: protects sensitive or high-blast-radius paths from broad restore and promote operations

rules.enforced: during checkpoint capture, including safety and fork-point checkpoints
rules.reason: keeps known secret or non-recoverable local files out of checkpoints

rules.enforced: during checkpoint capture, including safety and fork-point checkpoints
rules.reason: keeps known secret or non-recoverable local files out of checkpoints

rules.enforced: before the promoted branch is created
rules.reason: prevents landing a fork while the main workspace has unrelated local changes

rules.enforced: before the promoted branch is created
rules.reason: requires at least one checkpoint before a fork is landed into user git

rules.enforced: after the final branch name is resolved and before branch creation
rules.reason: keeps promoted branches inside reviewable team-owned namespaces

rules.enforced: after the final branch name is resolved and before branch creation
rules.reason: keeps promoted branches inside reviewable team-owned namespaces
keeps a minimum recovery window even when older checkpoints are eligible
marks old checkpoints as eligible while retaining protected recovery points
